source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Complete power wiring for the solar controller BATT input. This includes the BATT+, BATT-, and BATT +_SW wiring from the wiring diagram.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: 15. Complete power wiring for solar controller PV input . This includes the PV +, PV -, and PV+_SW wiring from the wiring diagram. Ensure that you use 10AWG (PN 221-612) WAGO connectors on the PV pigtails. The pigtails should be at least 12' long.
text_blocks.label: text

full_text: Complete power wiring for the solar controller BATT input. This includes the BATT+, BATT-, and BATT +_SW wiring from the wiring diagram. 15. Complete power wiring for solar controller PV input . This includes the PV +, PV -, and PV+_SW wiring from the wiring diagram. Ensure that you use 10AWG (PN 221-612) WAGO connectors on the PV pigtails. The pigtails should be at least 12' long.
